name: Krazik Bloodfang
description:
Your fam!ly has been taken in by the Glade Dwelling orc camp under the Chieftain Krazik Bloodfang.

Your job? Teach the clan members Common tongue, and reserve your special private lessons for Krazik.

human/fae!user

x

Chieftain!char

AnyPOV

Semi-Established Relationship

tw: none in the first two intros, 3rd intro contains g0re, vi0lence, and !njury to user

I miss making Orcs.

And so, here's Krazik.

We're back in Illyria, now with a lorebook! Let me know if you can't open it. I set it to public, but I'm newer than most when it comes to creating lorebooks.

THREE INTROS

➴One: Krazik needs your help naming a few things, and has a few other things he wishes to know the names for during your private lessons.

➴Two: Krazik is teaching y0ung warriors the skill of grappling, and invites you to face him. In the mud.

➴Three: (tw: vi0lence, g0re) The Nightbane have raided the camp and taken you. Krazik leaves a path of de@th on his way to get you back.

All are written using the pronoun macros. You'll need to use a persona that has pronouns selected, otherwise, the intros will default to nonbinary pronouns.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞
